blog_title: 5 Cool Activities That You Must Not Miss In Your Phuket Vacation
seo_title: 5 Cool Activities That You Must Not Miss In Your Phuket Vacation
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Tue Jun 17 2025

It’s great if you have decided to visit Phuket this time! Located in the Andaman Sea of Southern Thailand, it’s an extremely famous tourist destination frequented by millions worldwide.

While live shows, beautiful sunsets, open sea boat tours, etc. are just like the starters, the main course has a lot more to offer! If you and your partner have been zeroing in on Phuket for a long, get hold of a travel agency, browse through different couple tour packages for Phuket, and choose the one that fits the bill.

There are plenty of cool activities to indulge in in Phuket, that can truly make your vacation an exciting one. Check out the list given below:

​It’s time to participate in some water sports:

If you are a water baby and love thrills and adventures then you must know that Phuket is a water sports lover’s paradise. You can take part in various water activities in Phuket. Phuket’s west coast has top-notch facilities for water sports like windsurfing and snorkeling. Some beaches of Phuket like Layan and Nai Yang are known for kite surfing. Seasonal sports like Hobie Cat sailing and surfing are amazing as well.

​When the beautiful wild animals call you…

Into wildlife? Then you would absolutely be in love with the wild safari tours offered in Khao Sok National Park and Khao Lak Park. These parks are home to a broad variety of flora and fauna. The sight of gazelles, big cats, and wild elephants will be no less than a visual treat. In addition to these, you can also go for elephant trekking, bamboo rafting, and trekking to a waterfall. The highlight will be seeing the snake charmers playing, caressing, and kissing the most dangerous snakes as part of the snake shows that are held in Phuket.​

Off to island hopping:

Phuket is not only the Phi-Phi islands and Similan but there are more to it. There are plenty of striking and pristine islands near Phuket which are equally beautiful. If you want to leave the crowd behind and want to do something really exciting at an exotic location then island hopping is what you should try once. The Andaman Sea around Phuket is full of stunningly beautiful tropical islands and you are bound to get mesmerized.

Phuket’s 3D Trickeye Museum is so impressive:

Southern Island’s first 3D Trickeye Museum is an interactive museum that is basically designed to stimulate your creativity and imagination. It engages people with the art in a new way by actually letting them become a part of it. With different 3D art to see, you will be shocked and surprised just like a 3-year-old. The quality of the paintings there is truly something. You might be asked to take off your shoes before entering the museum.

Going to the topsy-turvy house:

Last but not least, have you ever seen an upside-down house? Yes, the story that you heard from your grandma in childhood about a topsy-turvy town is actually true. It’s just that, in reality, it’s not a town but a house! Also known as Baan Teelanka, it’s a fun and interesting place for not only children but adults as well on any day.

So if you are humming any tune taking you to Phuket seamlessly, then get in touch with a top-rated travel agency in Kolkata for much-needed assistance in Phuket tour plan from Kolkata.
